profile.name: DEEPIKA P
profile.headline: Aspiring software developer skilled in C, Python, DBMS, and SQL, eager to build efficient and scalable applications.
profile.summary: Passionate full-stack developer focused on creating modern, responsive web applications. Strong in problem-solving, with hands-on experience in React and real-world projects.

education.degree: B.E in Computer Science and Engineering
education.description: Strong academic foundation with a practical focus on real-world software development.

projects.title: Game-Hub
projects.description: Game Hub is a responsive website for searching and discovering games with easy filtering and a user-friendly interface.
projects.techDocSummary: Designed with a modular component system, websocket-based updates, and REST endpoints for board, member, and sprint data.

projects.title: Smart Energy Monitoring System Using IoT and Web Technologies
projects.description: A full-stack web application that monitors and analyzes energy usage in real time using simulated IoT sensor data, providing insights and cost estimation to help optimize electricity consumption.
projects.techDocSummary: Built around reusable dashboard cards, cached client-side queries, and a clean data pipeline from Firestore collections.

achievements.title: Game-Hub Web Development
achievements.description: Developed and deployed a responsive Game Hub website for efficient game search and discovery.

internship.description: Built responsive dashboard modules, improved accessibility across product flows, and collaborated with the backend team to integrate authenticated APIs.
